title: leymus × multiflorus
intro: Leymus × multiflorus, also known as big bluegrass, is a hybrid grass species that is native to North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leymus × multiflorus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Leymus × multiflorus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, making it a versatile herb for various applications.
